creative_brief: Close-up of hands holding rich, dark soil with cattle grazing peacefully in soft-focus background, warm golden hour lighting suggesting community connection to land.
primary_text:
When Rachel Ward started selling direct to FarmThru customers, something unexpected happened. Families began asking to invest in the farms they bought from. Now Rachel's regenerative beef operation has 47 community investors. Her cattle graze the same paddocks, but the profits stay local instead of flowing to distant shareholders.

No middlemen. Sydney families already collect from the Brookvale hub. We can't promise returns, but we can show you everything.
headline: Customers are buying the farms
description: Rachel's Farm now has 47 community investors. FarmThru's equity crowdfunding lets you own what you eat. Not financial advice.
